entries.note: V59-B reuses the shipped V59-A continuity region, admission, occupancy, live-turn reintegration, and continuity reintegration surfaces by default.
V59-B adds one explicit continuity-safe restoration handoff and one explicit continuity-safe restoration reintegration surface; restoration remains explicit state, not hidden cleanup.
V59-B requires same-session and same-turn continuation plus restoration-time capability and approval resnapshot before continuity-safe restoration may be reintegrated.
Historical ticket, occupancy, and prior continuity reintegration refs remain lineage inputs only and do not by themselves mint current-turn restoration entitlement.
V59-B requires explicit prior governed-state baseline match, explicit restoration-time state summary, and replay-law proof embedded in the continuity restoration reintegration report.
